user_system_path: source-truth promotion only; park issue #140 / PR #142 rail-only and promote issue #151 source-backed Right Now selector
allowed_files_raw: Source-truth promotion only: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json, and focused source-truth/continuity tests or gate logic required to enforce issue #151 as the next source-backed selector seam. Do not patch product code.
forbidden_files_raw: No product code: do not implement source-backed-state.ts in this promotion PR; no PR #142 changes, Slack code patch, landing implementation, Supabase schema, dashboard/auth/backend, Stripe, package files, Dependabot, connector expansion, Teams/email/calendar, Slack app settings, Vercel settings, paid model proof, or broad cleanup.

stop_condition: Stop when one source-truth closeout PR is open, proof is posted, and no product code has been patched.
anti_regression_checks: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md marks issue #140 / PR #142 parked externally blocked and rail-only
ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml active issue is #151
Issues #121, #131, #99, #48, and #147 are closed/superseded/completed and must not be reopened
